arts.ttl: Rangers fans descend on Manchester for Man Utd clash despite 'do not travel' warning
arts.sum: Rangers face Manchester United in the Europa League on Thursday, with thousands of fans of the Scottish side travelling down despite the incoming Storm Eowyn which will batter the UK

arts.ttl: Player wants to join Manchester United ‘immediately’ – Tells agents to sort it, pushing for January transfer
arts.sum: Patrick Dorgu has told Lecce he wants to join Manchester United ‘immediately’ and instructed his agents to get a transfer sorted. That’s according to Solo Lecce, who report that the negotiations for him have become a ‘tug of war’ between the various parties. arts.ttl: Chelsea line up opening bid for Alejandro Garnacho - and will have a free run at the Man United star as Napoli look elsewhere
arts.sum: The Manchester United forward has struggled to fit into Ruben Amorim's system, and has been of interest to the Blues, who are in the market for a new wide player this month.

arts.ttl: Rangers won't 'park the bus' against struggling United
